headline: Barclays and Evercore Stay Positive on Danaher (DHR) Despite Cutting Price Targets
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) is one of the 10 Unrivaled Stocks of the Next 5 Years. On April 14, Barclays reduced its price target on Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) from $250 to $230 and maintained its Overweight rating on the stock. The research firm adjusted price targets for the life sciences and diagnostic tools sector as part […]

headline: How Danaher’s Expanded Infectious Disease Partnership Could Shape DHR’s Recurring Revenue Story
summary: Earlier this week, Cepheid, a Danaher company, and Oxford Nanopore Technologies expanded their partnership to develop faster, more comprehensive molecular workflows for identifying bacterial and fungal pathogens, antimicrobial resistance, and genomic antibiotic susceptibility in bloodstream infection and sepsis research. This move deepens Danaher’s involvement in complex infectious disease diagnostics, potentially reinforcing its position in high-value, research-oriented testing as...
